svg.text: MANDARIN CHINESE — RUNNING TEXT · INTERLINEAR
SERIES 17D OF 50 · REMEMBER FORWARD
— · — CONFUCIUS · ANALECTS 1.1 · 论语 · c. 500 BCE — · —
子曰：学而时习之，不亦说乎？
zǐ yuē: xué ér shí xí zhī, bù yì yuè hū?
master says: learn and time/often practice it, not also joy?
“The Master said: To learn, and then to practice it often — is that not a joy?”
Note: 说 here is read yuè (rejoice), not shuō (speak) — a Classical Chinese homograph
— · — LAOZI · TAO TE CHING 1 · 道德经 · c. 400 BCE — · —
道可道，非常道。名可名，非常名。
dào kě dào, fēi cháng dào. míng kě míng, fēi cháng míng.
way can be-spoken, not eternal way. name can be-named, not eternal name.
“The Way that can be spoken is not the eternal Way. The name that can be named is not the eternal name.”
— · — LI BAI · QUIET NIGHT THOUGHT · 静夜思 · 701–762 CE — · —
床前明月光，疑是地上霜。
chuáng qián míng yuè guāng, yí shì dì shàng shuāng.
bed before bright moon light, suspect is ground above frost.
“Before my bed, bright moonlight — I thought it was frost on the ground.”
举头望明月，低头思故乡。
jǔ tóu wàng míng yuè, dī tóu sī gù xiāng.
raise head gaze bright moon, lower head think old hometown.
“I raised my head to gaze at the bright moon; I lowered it and thought of home.”
— · — XUNZI · PROVERB · 荆子 · c. 310–235 BCE — · —
不积跫步，无以至千里。
bù jī kuǐ bù, wú yǐ zhì qiān lǐ.
not accumulate half-steps, no-way reach thousand li.
“Without small steps, one cannot travel a thousand li.” (1 li ≈ 500 m)
— · — THE BRIDGE PHRASE — · —
此物为你而造，无偿奉上，
出自那些銘记未来的人。
cǐ wù wèi nǐ ér zào, wú cháng fèng shàng,
chū zì nà xiē míng jì wèilái de rén.
“This was made for you, freely, by those who kept the future in memory.”
— · — NOTE ON “REMEMBERED FORWARD” — · —
Chinese expresses "the future" as 未来 wèilái — "what has not yet arrived."
前 qián (forward/in front) traditionally meant the PAST — what you have already passed.
后 hòu (behind/after) meant the FUTURE — what comes after you, not yet seen.
The bridge phrase uses 銘记未来 míng jì wèilái: "to engrave the future in memory."
Simplified characters throughout; Traditional equivalents given on Plate 17A.
PLATE 17D · MANDARIN CHINESE · RUNNING TEXT · CC BY-SA 4.0 · rememberforward.org
SERIES 17 OF 50 · REMEMBER FORWARD
THIS IS A PATIENT MESSAGE. IT WAS MADE FOR YOU, FREELY, BY PEOPLE WHO REMEMBERED FORWARD.
BUY IT · BUILD IT · BURY IT · FOR SOMEONE YOU WILL NEVER MEET
